prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda L15C7T** (1.5L turbocharged VTEC direct-injection) with a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger, custom **PRL Motorsports** billet aluminum intake manifold, and **Toda Racing** forged internals (pistons, connecting rods, and crankshaft) for 450+ WHP on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU managing **ID1000x injectors** and **AEM X-Series** wideband O2 sensor

Full **MCS** 4-way adjustable coilover suspension with **Swift Springs** 12K/10K spring rates, **SuperPro** poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and trailing arms), and **Cusco** 22mm front / 19mm rear adjustable sway bars for track-focused handling

Dual **HKS Hi-Power** 4-inch titanium exhaust system with **Burns Stainless** 304-grade merge collectors, **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller, and **AEM** high-flow fuel pump with **Radium Engineering** dual fuel pressure regulators for E85 compatibility
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody conversion kit (custom-fitted for the 2025 Prelude’s chassis) with **Varis** carbon fiber front lip, side skirts, and rear diffuser, all painted in **PPG Honda Championship White (NH-576M)** with **3M Matte Black** accents

**Seibon Carbon** hood and trunk with **Aeromotions** active rear wing (3-position adjustable angle) and **Voltex** Type-5 front bumper canards, paired with **Work Meister S1 3P** 18x9.5 +38 / 18x10.5 +45 wheels in **Gunmetal** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (255/35/18 front, 285/30/18 rear)

**Recaro SP-G** front seats with **Takata Drift II** 4-point harnesses, **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel hub, and **Defi Advance BF** digital gauge cluster (boost, oil temp, and wideband AFR) mounted in a **JDM-spec** carbon fiber dashboard overlay
